mapper.select:
select count(*) from item
and item_type = #{searchType}
and (upper(item_name) like upper(('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'))) or (upper(item_id) like upper(('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')))
and item_usage = 'Y'
select vendor_id as vendorId, vendor_name as vendorName from vendor where vendor_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
insert into item ( item_id, item_name, item_type, item_unit, item_spec, item_unit_price, item_storage, item_vendor, item_usedate, item_safety_stock, item_usage ) values (
'RAW' || raw_seq.nextval
'SEMI' || semi_seq.nextval
'FIN' || fin_seq.nextval , #{itemName}, #{itemType}, #{unit}, #{spec}, #{unitPrice}, #{itemStorage}, #{itemVendor}, #{useDate}, #{safetyStock}, 'Y'
